name: Spanish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onions and green pepper, then sauté in oil until tender.
2. Add tomatoes and seasonings (cloves, pepper, salt). Cook for about 30 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, dissolve flour with water.
4. Stir the flour mixture into the tomato sauce.
5. Cook until thickened.
6. This sauce can be used on omelets, hamburgers, etc. Sliced mushrooms are an excellent addition.
